---
title: "Golden Mussel Sightings"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    self-contained: false
    theme: cosmo
---

```{ojs}
raw = await fetch("data.json").then(r => r.json())

// Convert Excel serial date to readable date
function excelDate(serial) {
  const date = new Date((serial - 25569) * 86400 * 1000)
  return date.toLocaleDateString("en-US")
}

// Clean up the data
data = raw.map(d => ({
  Station: d["Station"],
  Date: excelDate(d["Date"]),
  "Approximate Quantity": d["Approximate Quantity"],
  Description: d["Description (e_x002e_g_x002e_, found on sonde body)"],
  "First Sighting?": d["Is this the first golden mussel sighting at this station?"],
  Email: d["Email"]
}))

Inputs.table(data, {
  header: {
    Station: "Station",
    Date: "Date",
    "Approximate Quantity": "Quantity",
    Description: "Description",
    "First Sighting?": "First Sighting?",
    Email: "Submitted By"
  },
  width: {
    Station: 80,
    Date: 100,
    "Approximate Quantity": 80,
    Description: 300,
    "First Sighting?": 100,
    Email: 200
  }
})
```
